styles.css: & .wp-block-button__link { transition: background-color 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } & .wp-block-button__link:hover, & .wp-block-button__link:focus, & .wp-block-button__link:focus-visible { background-color: #05b04c !important; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(5, 176, 76, 0.32) !important; }
